steps.instruction: Prepare your aromatics: mince or thinly slice garlic cloves. The finer you chop, the faster it will cook.
Add olive oil to a cold or slightly warm pan. The amount of oil depends on the dish, but generally enough to coat the bottom of the pan.
Add the garlic to the oil. Turn the heat to medium-low. We want to gently infuse the oil with garlic flavor, not fry the garlic quickly.

Cook the garlic, stirring frequently, until it is fragrant and just beginning to turn golden. This should take about 1-3 minutes. Watch it very closely – burnt garlic is bitter and will ruin your dish!
steps.check: Is the garlic fragrant and just starting to turn golden, not brown?

steps.instruction: If you are adding other ingredients, do so immediately after the garlic is ready to prevent it from burning. If you are just making a garlic-infused oil, remove the pan from the heat as soon as the garlic is fragrant and golden.
